metadata.title: Attachment Management
metadata.description: Customize your attachment path of notes independently with variables and auto rename it on change.

regex.source: .setDesc("Using the extension override if you want to autorename the attachment with a specific extension (e.g. pdf or zip).")
regex.target: .setDesc("根据文件类型不同，使用您指定的命名规则来自动重命名附件（例如.pdf或zip）。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Regex pattern to exclude certain extensions from being handled.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`使用正则表达式筛选需要排除在处理之外的文件类型。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on this option if you want to also exclude all subfolders of the folder paths provided above.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想同时排除上面提供的文件夹路径的所有子文件夹，请打开此选项。")

regex.source: .innerText = "This operation is irreversible and experimental. Please backup your vault first!"
regex.target: .innerText = "此操作不可逆且为实验性质。请先备份您的配置！"
